name: Flood Doctor
description: Discovery index for what an AI agent can do on a Flood Doctor city site. Flood Doctor is a Northern Virginia water-damage restoration company serving 17 cities with 24/7 emergency service. URLs are relative so they resolve to the city subdomain currently being viewed.

skills.name: request-service
skills.description: Start a water-damage restoration service request for this city. Use for emergency water extraction, flood/sewage cleanup, structural drying, mold remediation, or fire/smoke damage. Submitting reaches the Flood Doctor dispatch team.

skills.name: browse-services
skills.description: Browse the full catalog of residential and commercial restoration services available in this service area, including water damage restoration, flood cleanup, structural drying, mold remediation, sewage cleanup, and fire/smoke restoration.

skills.name: find-service-area
skills.description: Find the Flood Doctor service area page for another Northern Virginia city. Each city has a dedicated subdomain (e.g. fairfax.flood.doctor, ashburn.flood.doctor) with localized service information.

skills.name: contact
skills.description: Contact Flood Doctor for questions about restoration services, scheduling, or insurance billing.
